title: Identify Tote Details After Selecting An Item On the Container Selection Screen
summary: Select an item on the Container Selection screen and verify that the selected item displays identifying details, specifically a box icon and tote number.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when viewing the Container Selection screen and you need to confirm which tote is associated with a selected item by checking the identifying details shown after selection.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to infer additional selection behavior not stated in the source.
Do not use this procedure as guidance for navigation to the Container Selection screen, because the source packet does not provide those steps.
Do not use this procedure for tote search, rack recovery, AGV removal, or other control actions not explicitly covered by this source evidence.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: View the Container Selection screen, select the item of interest, and verify whether the box icon and tote number are displayed for the selected item.

safety_notes: Use only the documented observation behavior from the source.
Do not assume additional interface actions or controls beyond what is stated in the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Container Selection screen
Ability to select an item on the screen

access_required: Access to the Container Selection screen
system_preconditions: The Container Selection screen is open or visible.
A selectable item is present on the Container Selection screen.

visual_references.description: Container Selection screen frame showing that selecting an item displays a box icon and tote number.

steps.title: View the Container Selection screen
steps.purpose: Establish the correct screen context before checking selected-item details.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Container Selection screen.
steps.expected_result: The Container Selection screen is visible and available for item selection.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator can see the Container Selection screen with selectable entries.
steps.failure_condition: The Container Selection screen is not visible or selectable entries cannot be identified from the current view.

actions.label: View Container Selection screen
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Container Selection screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Container Selection screen with selectable rack or tote entries.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Container Selection screen cannot be accessed or viewed.
The visible screen does not match the documented Container Selection context.

source_evidence.text: Open or view the Container Selection screen. [Image support needed: Container Selection screen with selectable rack or tote entries.]
Training slide frame showing the Container Selection screen for locating and selecting totes, racks, or AGVs in the system.

steps.title: Select the item of interest
steps.purpose: Trigger the display of identifying details for the selected item.
steps.instruction: Select the item of interest on the Container Selection screen.
steps.expected_result: The system recognizes the selected item and displays its associated identifying details.
steps.healthy_condition: The selected item is highlighted or otherwise treated as selected, and additional identifying details become available.
steps.failure_condition: Selecting the item does not produce the documented identifying details.

actions.label: Select item
actions.exact_action: Select the item of interest on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Selectable item entries on the Container Selection screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Selecting the item does not show the documented box icon and tote number.

source_evidence.text: Select the item of interest on the screen.
On the Container Selection screen, selecting an item shows a box icon and the tote number for the selected container.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR text indicates that selecting an item shows a box icon as well as the tote number.

steps.title: Check for the box icon
steps.purpose: Verify one of the documented identifying indicators for the selected item.
steps.instruction: Check whether a box icon appears for the selected item.
steps.expected_result: A box icon is visible for the selected item.
steps.healthy_condition: The selected item shows the documented box icon.
steps.failure_condition: No box icon appears after the item is selected.

actions.label: Inspect for box icon
actions.exact_action: Check whether a box icon appears for the selected item.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Selected item area where the box icon is expected to appear.

stop_or_escalate_if: The selected item does not show a box icon.

source_evidence.text: Check whether a box icon appears for the selected item.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR text indicates that selecting an item shows a box icon as well as the tote number.

source_evidence.text: OCR text states that selecting a location shows a box icon and the tote number.

steps.title: Verify the tote number
steps.purpose: Verify the second documented identifying indicator for the selected item.
steps.instruction: Verify that the tote number is displayed with the selected item.
steps.expected_result: The tote number is visible for the selected item.
steps.healthy_condition: The selected item shows the tote number.
steps.failure_condition: The tote number is not displayed after the item is selected.

actions.label: Inspect for tote number
actions.exact_action: Verify that the tote number is displayed with the selected item.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Selected item area where the tote number is expected to be displayed.

stop_or_escalate_if: The selected item does not show a tote number.

source_evidence.text: Verify that the tote number is displayed with the selected item.
Selecting an item on the Container Selection screen displays additional identifying information including a box icon and tote number.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR text indicates that selecting an item shows a box icon as well as the tote number.

steps.title: Confirm the selected tote
steps.purpose: Use the displayed identifiers to confirm which tote is currently selected.
steps.instruction: Use the displayed box icon and tote number to confirm which tote is selected.
steps.expected_result: The operator can identify the selected tote from the displayed box icon and tote number.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed identifiers clearly correspond to the selected tote.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed identifiers are missing, unclear, or insufficient to confirm the selected tote.

actions.label: Confirm selected tote
actions.exact_action: Use the displayed box icon and tote number to confirm which tote is selected.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Displayed box icon and tote number associated with the selected item.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed details do not allow the operator to confirm which tote is selected.
Selecting an item does not show the documented box icon and tote number.

source_evidence.text: Use the displayed box icon and tote number to confirm which tote is selected.
The selected item shows additional identifying information, including a box icon and tote number.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR text indicates that selecting an item shows a box icon as well as the tote number.

success_criteria: An item on the Container Selection screen is selected.
A box icon appears for the selected item.
The tote number is displayed for the selected item.
The operator can confirm which tote is selected using the displayed identifiers.
healthy_conditions: The Container Selection screen is visible.
The selected item displays a box icon.
The selected item displays a tote number.
The displayed details clearly identify the selected tote.
failure_conditions: The Container Selection screen cannot be viewed.
Selecting the item does not show a box icon.
Selecting the item does not show a tote number.
The displayed information does not clearly confirm the selected tote.
escalation_guidance: Escalate or seek clarification if selecting an item does not show the documented box icon and tote number.
Seek clarification if the screen behavior differs from the source-supported description.
Do not assume additional selection behavior beyond what is stated in the source.
